hero.headline: Your business already runs. We make it run smarter.
hero.subheadline: We plug AI into what you already have. No migrations. No disruption. No vendor lock-in.

tech_gap.title: The tech gap
tech_gap.body: Edge technology exists, but it's built for companies with 500+ employees and six-figure IT budgets. Small and mid-sized businesses get left behind - or get sold oversized solutions they can't maintain.

rip_replace.title: The rip-and-replace trap
rip_replace.body: Every vendor wants to replace your entire stack. You didn't ask for a migration. You asked for help. Your systems work - they just need an intelligent layer on top.

trust_gap.title: The trust gap
trust_gap.body: You've been burned by consultants who recommend what they sell, not what you need. You need someone who'll tell you when an off-the-shelf product beats a custom build - even if it means less work for them.

services.intro: We turn problems into working systems.

discovery.title: Discovery & requirements
discovery.body: Stakeholder workshops, current-state analysis, pain-point identification.

advisory.title: Solution design & advisory
advisory.body: We recommend off-the-shelf vs custom vs AI backend based on fit, not vendor pressure. We'll suggest competitors if they're a better fit.

training.title: Workshops & training
training.body: Sessions on AI adoption, automation strategy, and tech literacy for SMBs.

ai_backends.title: AI-powered backends
ai_backends.body: Document intelligence, unstructured data extraction, NLP pipelines. Python, FastAPI, containerised microservices.

integration.title: System integration
integration.body: Microsoft 365, SharePoint, Teams, CRMs, third-party APIs. No migration required.

automation.title: Workflow automation
automation.body: Power Automate, Make, n8n - eliminate manual steps across platforms.

open_source.title: Open-source projects
open_source.body: Production-grade tools under MIT license. DocIQ is the flagship.

rows.before: Staff spend 4 hours/day copying data between PDFs and your system
rows.after: An AI backend extracts, validates, and loads it in seconds

rows.before: Your CRM, EHR, and accounting tool don't talk to each other
rows.after: A lightweight integration layer syncs them - no new platform needed

rows.before: You're told you need to replace everything
rows.after: You keep what works. We add what's missing

rows.before: AI tools feel inaccessible or oversold
rows.after: You attend a workshop and leave with a working prototype

process.key_message: One person handles the full lifecycle - the person who gathered your requirements is the person who builds it. Same context. Same accountability.

steps.title: Listen
steps.body: Free clarity session. You tell us what's broken. No pitch, no commitment.

steps.title: Map
steps.body: We document your current state - systems, workflows, pain points, budget constraints.

steps.title: Recommend
steps.body: We design a solution - and it might not include us. If an off-the-shelf tool solves it, we'll say so.

steps.title: Build
steps.body: We build what's agreed. Iterative delivery, not a 6-month black box. You see working software early and often.

steps.title: Handover
steps.body: Full documentation, BAU handover, knowledge transfer. You own everything. No lock-in.

articles.title: Why we enhance your systems instead of replacing them
articles.excerpt: Most consultants recommend what they sell. We recommend what fits. Here's our philosophy on system enhancement over replacement.

articles.title: How we built DocIQ: an open-source AI engine for medical document processing
articles.excerpt: 1,100+ tests, 3 document types, 2 languages, FHIR R4 compliant. A technical deep-dive into building production-grade document intelligence.

articles.title: 5 signs your business is ready for AI - and 3 signs you're not
articles.excerpt: AI isn't magic. It's infrastructure. Here's how to tell if your business is actually ready - and what to fix first if you're not.

about.bio_p1: Amphibian Labs was founded by Pierre Montanov - a technical consultant and engineer with 5+ years in the industry, a Master's in IT, and dual expertise in business analysis and software engineering.
about.bio_p2: Pierre saw first-hand how small and mid-sized businesses get underserved by the tech industry. Enterprise tools exist, but they're priced and scoped for enterprises. SMBs deserve the same calibre of technology - built to fit their scale, their budget, and their existing systems.
about.bio_p3: Amphibian Labs closes that gap. We don't replace what works. We enhance it with AI backends, workflow automation, and system integration. And when we're done, you own everything.
about.philosophy: Amphibian Labs is a lab in the true sense - we create, experiment, publish, and help.

engagement.intro: Flexible options - no lock-in contracts. Start small and scale up when you're ready.

discovery.title: Discovery session
discovery.description: 2-hour session (remote or in-person). We listen to the pain, ask diagnostic questions, and map your current state. Written report delivered within 48 hours: what we found, what we recommend, 2–3 actionable suggestions - which may or may not include Amphibian Labs. No obligation.
discovery.cta: Book a discovery session - $300 for 2 hours of honest answers and a written report.

discover.label: Discover
discover.title: Understand what you have and what you need
discover.best_for: Businesses who know something isn't working but aren't sure what to fix first.

evolve.label: Evolve
evolve.title: Monthly retainer for evolving needs
evolve.best_for: Businesses that want a tech partner on call.

contact.subtitle: Tell us what's broken. We'll reply with the next step.
contact.confirmation: Got it. We'll be in touch within 24 hours.
